content:
Welcome to my portfolio ！
Please click on the portfolio to view my recent works.
If there are any job openings, please take a look at my resume.
Proud contributor to the open-code-review open-source project.
Here is my book list, skills, and some other stuff. Have fun!
                                                                                        
                                                                                        ——Paradox

欢迎来到我的作品集！
请点击作品集查看我最近的作品
如果有招聘岗位，请查看我的简历
很幸运参与了open-code-review的开源项目
这里有我的书单，skills以及一些其他玩意，玩的开心

                                                                                        ——Paradox
